tasks.subject: Task 1: Enhance Rust git_graph backend
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ref labels, HEAD resolution, and optional from_ref filtering to the git_graph Tauri command.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/commands/git.rs:18-185`

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop/src-tauri && cargo build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/commands/git.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop/src-tauri && cargo build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GraphCommit has refs field", "GraphResult struct exists", "from_ref parameter works", "HEAD commit returned"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Frontend plumbing — types, mock, shortcut context, i18n
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update TypeScript types, browser mock, shortcut context infrastructure, and i18n keys.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/utils/commitGraph.ts`, `apps/desktop/src/tauri-mock.ts`, `apps/desktop/src/composables/useShortcutContext.ts`, `apps/desktop/src/composables/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts`, `apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/*.json`, `apps/desktop/src/utils/__tests__/commitGraph.test.ts`

**Verify:** `bun tsc --noEmit --project apps/desktop/tsconfig.json && bun test apps/desktop/src/utils/__tests__/commitGraph.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/utils/commitGraph.ts", "apps/desktop/src/tauri-mock.ts", "apps/desktop/src/composables/useShortcutContext.ts", "apps/desktop/src/composables/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts", "apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/en.json", "apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ja.json", "apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ko.json", "apps/desktop/src/utils/__tests__/commitGraph.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "bun tsc --noEmit --project apps/desktop/tsconfig.json && bun test apps/desktop/src/utils/__tests__/commitGraph.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GraphCommit has refs field", "GraphResult interface exists", "graph shortcut context added", "mock updated", "i18n keys added", "tests pass"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: CommitGraphView — labels, filtering, scroll-to-HEAD, shortcuts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire up all frontend features: ref labels on commits, auto/all mode toggle via Space, scroll-to-HEAD on open, and register supplementary shortcuts for the help overlay.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/components/CommitGraphModal.vue`, `apps/desktop/src/components/CommitGraphView.vue`

**Verify:** `bun tsc --noEmit --project apps/desktop/tsconfig.json`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/components/CommitGraphModal.vue", "apps/desktop/src/components/CommitGraphView.vue"], "verifyCommand": "bun tsc --noEmit --project apps/desktop/tsconfig.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ref labels render", "Space toggles mode", "mode indicator visible", "scrolls to HEAD", "shortcuts registered", "modal uses graph context"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
